data.id: TR-PICUS-EVASION-001: Process Environment Block (PEB) Manipulation / Process Masquerading
data.name: TR-PICUS-EVASION-001: Process Environment Block (PEB) Manipulation / Process Masquerading
data.description: Detects suspicious processes loading ntdll.dll and making calls to NtQueryInformationProcess with ProcessBasicInformation class to read/modify the PEB. This technique allows attackers to hide true process identity. Monitors for process masquerading attempts. MITRE T1036.004, T1070.
data.contents: process.modules contains 'ntdll.dll' AND (process.apiCalls contains 'NtQueryInformationProcess' OR process.apiCalls contains 'NtSetInformationProcess') AND (process.path contains '\\Temp\\' OR process.path contains '\\AppData\\' OR process.path contains '\\Downloads\\' OR process.path contains '\\ProgramData\\')
